source_description: Follow-up to the post-merge mission review of implement-grounded-stage-2-functions-01KSHZPC: close four contract gaps (surface authored missing-input guidance + structured report through Stage 3 to fully deliver FR-008; fix built-in loader pre-registration suppression footgun; make deep-sleep own-baseline result numerically honest when unavailable/unknown; add the missing weight_trend Stage 3 end-to-end test). No new signals; profile-dependent work stays deferred to #6.
